home.title: Home
All processing happens in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
home.subtitle: Every tool you need to work with PDFs
home.description: All PDF processing happens directly in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
footer.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
tools.merge-pdf.name: Merge PDF
tools.merge-pdf.description: Combine multiple PDFs into a single file. Fast and easy!
tools.split-pdf.name: Split PDF
tools.split-pdf.description: Extract pages or split a PDF into multiple documents.
tools.compress-pdf.name: Compress PDF
tools.compress-pdf.description: Reduce file size while maintaining quality.
tools.rotate-pdf.name: Rotate PDF
tools.rotate-pdf.description: Rotate PDF pages. Multiple files supported.
tools.watermark-pdf.name: Watermark
tools.watermark-pdf.description: Add text or image watermarks to your PDFs.
tools.page-numbers.name: Page Numbers
tools.page-numbers.description: Add page numbers to your PDF documents.
tools.pdf-to-jpg.name: PDF to JPG
tools.pdf-to-jpg.description: Convert PDF pages to JPG images.
tools.jpg-to-pdf.name: JPG to PDF
tools.jpg-to-pdf.description: Convert images to a PDF document.
tool.upload_description: or drag and drop files here
tool.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
tool.error_occurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
tools.protect-pdf.name: Protect PDF
tools.protect-pdf.description: Protect your PDFs with a password.
tools.unlock-pdf.name: Unlock PDF
tools.unlock-pdf.description: Remove password protection from a PDF.
tools.organize-pdf.name: Organize PDF
tools.crop-pdf.name: Crop PDF
tools.crop-pdf.description: Trim margins or crop PDF pages.
tools.pdf-to-png.name: PDF to PNG
tools.pdf-to-png.description: Convert PDF pages to PNG images.
tools.redact-pdf.name: Redact PDF
tools.edit-pdf.name: Edit PDF
tools.edit-pdf.description: Add text, shapes, and drawings to your PDF.
tools.sign-pdf.name: Sign PDF
tools.sign-pdf.description: Sign your documents with a drawn or image signature.
tools.extract-images.name: Extract Images
tools.extract-images.description: Extract all images from a PDF document.
tools.grayscale-pdf.name: Grayscale PDF
tools.grayscale-pdf.description: Convert your PDF to black and white.
tools.resize-pdf.name: Resize PDF
tools.resize-pdf.description: Change PDF page size (A4, Letter, etc.).
tools.header-footer.name: Header & Footer
tools.header-footer.description: Add custom header and footer text.
tool.organize.drag_hint: Drag to reorder. Click X to delete.
tool.crop.hint: Drag the edges to adjust the crop area.
tool.redact.hint: Click and drag on the preview to mark areas for redaction.
tool.redact.no_areas: Please draw at least one area to redact on the preview
tool.edit.no_elements: Add at least one text block
tool.edit.drag_hint: Click to select. Double-click to edit text. Drag to reposition.
tool.sign.position_label: Position your signature on the page
tool.extract.no_images: No images found in this PDF.
tool.headerfooter.placeholder_hint: Use {page} for page number, {total} for total pages
tool.watermark.no_preview: Upload a PDF to see preview
